channel.title: GitHub, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by GitHub, Inc. (github_m).

item.title: CVE-2026-49982 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — tmp: Type-confusion bypass of _assertPath in tmp@0.2.6 allows path traversal via non-string prefix/postfix/template
item.description: tmp is a temporary file and directory creator for node.js. In version 0.2.6, the _assertPath guard added to tmp rejects only string values that contain the substring ... It is bypassed when prefix, postfix, or template is supplied as a non-string val…

item.title: CVE-2026-44705 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — tmp: Path Traversal via unsanitized prefix/postfix enables directory escape
item.description: tmp is a temporary file and directory creator for node.js. Prior to 0.2.6, the tmp npm package contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows escaping the intended temporary directory when untrusted data flows into the prefix, postfix, or dir op…

item.title: CVE-2026-44486 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: Proxy-Authorization header leaks to redirect target when proxy is re-evaluated to direct connection
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. Prior to 0.32.0 and 1.16.0, Axios’ Node.js HTTP adapter can leak proxy credentials to a redirect target in affected versions. When a request is sent through an authenticated proxy, Axi…

item.title: CVE-2026-44487 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: Proxy-Authorization Credential Leak to Origin Server Across HTTP-to-HTTPS Redirect in Axios Node.js HTTP Adapter
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. Prior to 0.32.0 and 1.16.0, Axios’s Node.js HTTP adapter may forward a Proxy-Authorization header to a redirected origin during specific proxy-to-direct redirect flows. This affects No…

item.title: CVE-2026-44488 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in axios
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. Axios versions 1.7.0 through 1.15.x did not enforce configured request and response size limits when requests were sent with the fetch adapter. Applications that selected adapter: 'fet…

item.title: CVE-2026-44490 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Axios: DoS & Header Injection via Prototype Pollution Read-Side Gadgets in axios merge functions
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. Prior to 0.32.0 and 1.16.0, axios exposes two read-side prototype-pollution gadgets. When Object.prototype is polluted by an upstream dependency in the same process (e.g. lodash _.merg…

item.title: CVE-2026-44496 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via Cookie Name Injection
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. Axios versions before 0.32.0 on the 0.x line and before 1.16.0 on the 1.x line build a regular expression from the configured XSRF cookie name without escaping regex metacharacters. In…

item.title: CVE-2026-44495 · 7 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: Credential Theft and Response Hijacking via Prototype Pollution Gadget in Config Merge
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. From 0.19.0 to before 0.31.1 and 1.15.2, Axios contains prototype-pollution gadgets in request config processing. If another vulnerability in the same JavaScript process has already po…

item.title: CVE-2026-44494 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: Full Man-in-the-Middle via Prototype Pollution Gadget in `config.proxy`
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. From 1.0.0 to before 1.16.0, the Axios library is vulnerable to a Prototype Pollution "Gadget" attack that allows any Object.prototype pollution in the application's dependency tree to…

item.title: CVE-2026-44489 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — Axios: Proxy-Authorization Header Injection via Prototype Pollution — Incomplete Null-Prototype Fix
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. From 1.15.2 to before 1.16.0, nested objects created by utils.merge() (e.g., config.proxy) are still constructed as plain {} with Object.prototype in their chain. The setProxy() functi…

item.title: CVE-2026-44492 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Axios: shouldBypassProxy does not recognize IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses, allowing NO_PROXY bypass (incomplete fix for CVE-2025-62718)
item.description: Axios is a promise based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. Prior to 0.32.0 and 1.16.0, Axios does not normalise IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses. When NO_PROXY lists an IPv4 address such as 127.0.0.1 or 169.254.169.254, a request URL using the IPv4-…

item.title: CVE-2026-53723 · 5.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — guzzlehttp/guzzle-services' XML Request Serialization Vulnerable to XML Injection via CDATA Terminator
item.description: Guzzle Services provides an implementation of the Guzzle Command library that uses Guzzle service descriptions to describe web services, serialize requests, and parse responses into easy to use model structures. Versions prior ro 1.5.4 do not safely…

item.title: CVE-2026-49214 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — guzzlehttp/psr7 has CRLF Injection via URI Host Component
item.description: guzzlehttp/psr7 is a PSR-7 HTTP message library implementation in PHP. Versions prior to 2.10.2 did not reject ASCII control characters, whitespace, or DEL in first-party URI host components. A vulnerable flow is: First, an application accepts a user…

item.title: CVE-2026-48998 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — guzzlehttp/psr7 has Host Confusion via Authority Reinterpretation
item.description: guzzlehttp/psr7 is a PSR-7 HTTP message library implementation in PHP. Versions prior to 2.10.2 contain improper Host header validation when parsing raw HTTP request messages and when deriving a server request URI from server variables. An attacker c…

item.title: CVE-2026-46645 · 4.3 MEDIUM — SQLAdmin: Authorization Bypass on `ajax_lookup`
item.description: SQLAdmin is a flexible Admin interface for SQLAlchemy models. Prior to version 0.25.1, the ajax_lookup endpoint in application.py bypasses the is_accessible() access control check that all other endpoints enforce. If a developer restricts model acces…

item.title: CVE-2026-46695 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BoxLite: Permission Bypass in boxlite Allows Modification of Read-Only Files
item.description: Boxlite is a sandbox service that allows users to create lightweight virtual machines (Boxes) and launch OCI containers within them to run untrusted code. Prior to version 0.9.0, Boxlite does not restrict the kernel capabilities available inside the…

item.title: CVE-2026-46703 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BoxLite: Path Traversal Vulnerability in boxlite Leads to Arbitrary File Write on the Host
item.description: Boxlite is a sandbox service that allows users to create lightweight virtual machines (Boxes) and launch OCI containers within them to run untrusted code. Prior to version 0.9.0, Boxlite allows users to specify the OCI image used by containers in the…

item.title: CVE-2026-47213 · 6.5 MEDIUM — BoxLite: Timeout Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Boxlite is a sandbox service that allows users to create lightweight virtual machines (Boxes) and launch OCI containers within them to run untrusted code. In versions 0.8.2 and prior, Boxlite allows users to configure a timeout for services running i…

item.title: CVE-2026-42568 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Yamcs Vulnerable to LDAP Injection in LdapAuthModule
item.description: Yamcs is a mission control framework. Prior to versions 5.13.0 and 5.12.7, an LDAP injection vulnerability exists in `org.yamcs.security.LdapAuthModule` when constructing search filters. The username parameter is inserted directly into the LDAP filte…

item.title: CVE-2026-52726 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Dulwich's submodule path traversal in porcelain.submodule_update / porcelain.clone(recurse_submodules=True) yields RCE via attacker-dropped .git/hooks payload
item.description: Dulwich is a pure-Python implementation of the Git file formats and protocols. Starting in version 0.23.2 and prior to version 1.2.5, `dulwich.porcelain.submodule_update`, and by extension `porcelain.clone(..., recurse_submodules=True)`, materializes…

item.title: CVE-2026-44693 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Pi-hole FTL: Unauthenticated Session Hijacking via Race Condition on Global Session Buffer
item.description: Pi-hole FTL is the core engine of the Pi-hole network-level advertisement and tracker blocker. Prior to version 6.6.1, Pi-hole FTL contains a race condition vulnerability in the HTTP session management subsystem, introduced with the v6.0 rewrite of t…

item.title: CVE-2026-47734 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Dulwich has unbounded memory allocation in receive-pack from crafted thin packs
item.description: Dulwich is a pure-Python implementation of the Git file formats and protocols. Starting in version 0.1.0 and prior to version 1.2.5, a client with push access could push a tiny crafted thin pack (~174 bytes) whose delta header declares a huge dest_si…

item.title: CVE-2026-53465 · 6.2 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write in SF3 encoder when writing multi-frame image
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to version 7.1.2-25, a crafted multi-frame can result in a heap buffer over-write when encoding it with the SF3 encoder. This issue has been patched…

item.title: CVE-2026-53464 · 4 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Memory Leak in wand option parser when providing invalid arguments
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to version 7.1.2-25, when providing invalid options to the wand option parser a small memory leak will occur. This issue has been patched in version…

item.title: CVE-2026-53463 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Null Pointer Dereference in distort operation when passing incorrect arguments
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-50 and 7.1.2-25, when passing incorrect arguments in the distort operation a null pointer deference will occur. This issue has bee…

item.title: CVE-2026-53462 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Use-After-Free when allocation in CheckPrimitiveExtent fails
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-50 and 7.1.2-25, when an allocation fails in CheckPrimitiveExtent this can result in a heap-use-after-free and result in a crash.…

item.title: CVE-2026-53461 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Out-of-bounds write in ICON decoder due to incorrect loop
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-50 and 7.1.2-25, an incorrect loop in the ICON decoder can result in an out of bounds heap write resulting in a crash. This issue…

item.title: CVE-2026-53460 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Policy Bypass can trigger out-of-Memory condition
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-50 and 7.1.2-25, a missing check for maximum memory request in AcquireAlignedMemory could trigger an out-of-Memory condition. This…

item.title: CVE-2026-47712 · 3.3 LOW — Dulwich doesn't sanitize commit subjects in `porcelain.format_patch`
item.description: Dulwich is a pure-Python implementation of the Git file formats and protocols. Starting in version 0.24.0 and prior to version 1.2.5, dulwich.porcelain.format_patch(outdir=...) derives each patch filename from the commit's subject line. Prior to this…

item.title: CVE-2026-49219 · 5.5 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Policy Bypass can read disallowed files
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-24, an incorrect parsing of the filename can result in a policy bypass and read files disallowed by a security policy…

item.title: CVE-2026-49218 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Policy Bypass in DCM decoder could result in image with invalid dimensions
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-24, a missing check in the DCM decoder could result in an image with invalid dimensions and that could cause crashes…

item.title: CVE-2026-48994 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write in MAT decoder on 32-bit systems
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-24, a missing check of a return value could lead to a heap buffer over-write in the MAT decoder on 32-bit systems. Th…

item.title: CVE-2026-48734 · 5.5 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Stack Overflow in MVG decoder
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-49 and 7.1.2-24, a crafted MVG file could result in a stack overflow due to a missing depth or visited-set check. This issue has b…

item.title: CVE-2026-42305 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Dulwich has an arbitrary file write via NTFS-hostile tree entries on Windows
item.description: Dulwich is a pure-Python implementation of the Git file formats and protocols. Versions starting with 0.10.0 and prior to 1.2.5 have an arbitrary file write leading to remote code execution when cloning or checking out a malicious Git repository on W…

item.title: CVE-2026-48733 · 4.7 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Infinite Loop in subimage-search with crafted image
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-49 and 7.1.2-24, an infinite loop in the subimage-search operation can happen when using a crafted image. This issue has been patc…

item.title: CVE-2026-48724 · 5.5 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Underwrite in Floyd-Steinberg depth dithering
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to version 7.1.2-24, when using an image with mask the Floyd-Steinberg dithering method it will cause a negative heap buffer over-write. This issue h…

item.title: CVE-2026-47166 · 5.7 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Read in distributed pixel cache server
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, an attacker who can connect to a magick -distribute-cache service can cause a heap buffer over-read in the server…

item.title: CVE-2026-47165 · 4.1 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Information Disclosure in distributed pixel cache server because it is not using a challenge–response authentication model
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, the distributed pixel cache was originally designed to operate without a challenge–response authentication model.…

item.title: CVE-2026-46693 · 4.1 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Race Condition in distributed pixel cache server can result in file descriptor hijacking
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, an attacker who can connect to a magick -distribute-cache service can hijack a file descriptor in the server proc…

item.title: CVE-2026-42563 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Dulwich Vulnerable to Command Injection via Merge Driver Path
item.description: Dulwich is a pure-Python implementation of the Git file formats and protocols. Starting in version 0.24.0 and prior to version 1.2.5, Dulwich's `ProcessMergeDriver` substitutes the file path (from the git tree, controllable by an attacker via a malic…

item.title: CVE-2026-46692 · 4.1 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write in distributed pixel cache server
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, an attacker who can connect to a magick -distribute-cache service can cause a heap buffer over-write in the serve…

item.title: CVE-2026-46559 · 4 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write of a single byte in the JP2 encoder
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, an incorrect check in the JP2 will result in an heap buffer over-write of a single byte when specifying certain o…

item.title: CVE-2026-46557 · 6.2 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Stack overflow in fx operation
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to version 7.1.2-23, due to a missing depth check a stack overflow can occur in the fx operation by passing a crafted argument. This issue has been p…

item.title: CVE-2026-46521 · 5.5 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write in MIFF encoder when using LZMA compression
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, when using LZMA compression in the MIFF encoder an out of bounds write can occur due to a missing check. This iss…

item.title: CVE-2026-42558 · 7.6 HIGH — Xibo Vulnerable to Stored XSS and Iframe Sandbox Escape via Data Connector Script in DataSet
item.description: Xibo is an open source digital signage platform with a web content management system and Windows display player software. Prior to 4.4.2, a vulnerability chain consisting of Stored XSS and Iframe Sandbox escape in the Xibo CMS allows users with DataS…

item.title: CVE-2026-46520 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write in IPL decoder when reading multiple images of different dimensions
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-23, when reading multiple images with different dimensions an out of bounds heap write can occur. This issue has been…

item.title: CVE-2026-45664 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Policy Bypass in MNG coder could
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-47 and 7.1.2-22, because of a missing check in the MNG coder it would be possible to read more images than the list limit policy w…

item.title: CVE-2026-46522 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — ImageMagick: Infinite Loop in the MIFF decoder can lead to CPU exhaustion
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2.23 and 6.9.13-48, due to a missing check in the MIFF decoder, a crafted file could cause an infinite loop resulting in CPU exhausti…

item.title: CVE-2026-45624 · 5.1 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Read of a 4 bytes in distort operation.
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-47 and 7.1.2-22, when performing a polynomial distortion an out of bounds over-read of 24 bytes can occur when specifying specific…

item.title: CVE-2026-45359 · 5.7 MEDIUM — ImageMagick: Out-of-Bounds Read in connected components when the user supplies an invalid keep-top define
item.description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 6.9.13-48 and 7.1.2-22, an invalid connected-components:keep-top value could result in a heap buffer over-read when performing the connec…
